mapper.select: SELECT id, app_id, public_key, private_key, key_version, kit_version, ak, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_identity_t WHERE app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_app_identity_t (id, app_id, public_key, private_key, key_version, kit_version, ak, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{publicKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{privateKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keyVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{kitVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ak,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3), #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3))
